+import {
+  isNonEmptyString,
+  normalizeRelativeCardResourcePath,
+  validateImageUrl,
+} from "../shared/utils";
+
+export type ImageSourceType = "file" | "url";
+export type LayoutType = "single" | "grid" | "long-scroll" | "horizontal-scroll";
+export type GridMode = "2x2" | "3x3" | "3-column-infinite";
+export type ScrollMode = "fixed-window" | "adaptive";
+export type SingleAlignment = "left" | "center" | "right";
+export type HeightMode = "auto" | "fixed";
+
+export interface ImageItem {
+  id: string;
+  source: ImageSourceType;
+  file_path?: string;
+  url?: string;
+  alt?: string;
+  title?: string;
+}
+
+export interface LayoutOptions {
+  grid_mode?: GridMode;
+  scroll_mode?: ScrollMode;
+  fixed_window_height?: number;
+  single_width_percent?: number;
+  single_alignment?: SingleAlignment;
+  gap?: number;
+}
+
+export interface ImageLayoutConfig {
+  height_mode?: HeightMode;
+  fixed_height?: number;
+}
+
+export interface BasecardConfig {
+  card_type: "ImageCard";
+  theme?: string;
+  layout?: ImageLayoutConfig;
+  images: ImageItem[];
+  layout_type: LayoutType;
+  layout_options?: LayoutOptions;
+}
+
+export interface ConfigValidationResult {
+  valid: boolean;
+  errors: Record<string, string>;
+}
+
+export const defaultLayoutOptions: Required<LayoutOptions> = {
+  grid_mode: "2x2",
+  scroll_mode: "fixed-window",
+  fixed_window_height: 600,
+  single_width_percent: 100,
+  single_alignment: "center",
+  gap: 8,
+};
+
+export const defaultImageLayoutConfig: Required<ImageLayoutConfig> = {
+  height_mode: "auto",
+  fixed_height: 720,
+};
+
+export const defaultBasecardConfig: BasecardConfig = {
+  card_type: "ImageCard",
+  theme: "",
+  layout: { ...defaultImageLayoutConfig, height_mode: "auto" },
+  images: [],
+  layout_type: "single",
+  layout_options: { ...defaultLayoutOptions },
+};
+
+function asString(value: unknown): string | undefined {
+  return typeof value === "string" ? value.trim() : undefined;
+}
+
+function asPositiveNumber(value: unknown): number | undefined {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value) && value > 0 ? value : undefined;
+}
+
+function asNonNegativeNumber(value: unknown): number | undefined {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0 ? value : undefined;
+}
+
+function normalizeImageItem(input: unknown, index: number): ImageItem {
+  const record = typeof input === "object" && input ? (input as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
+  const source: ImageSourceType = record.source === "url" ? "url" : "file";
+  const filePath = normalizeRelativeCardResourcePath(record.file_path);
+  const url = asString(record.url);
+
+  return {
+    id: asString(record.id) ?? `image-${index + 1}`,
+    source,
+    file_path: source === "file" ? filePath : undefined,
+    url: source === "url" ? url : undefined,
+    alt: asString(record.alt) ?? "",
+    title: asString(record.title) ?? "",
+  };
+}
+
+export function normalizeBasecardConfig(input: Record<string, unknown> | null | undefined): BasecardConfig {
+  const record = input ?? {};
+  const layoutOptionsInput = typeof record.layout_options === "object" && record.layout_options
+    ? (record.layout_options as Record<string, unknown>)
+    : {};
+  const layoutInput = typeof record.layout === "object" && record.layout
+    ? (record.layout as Record<string, unknown>)
+    : {};
+
+  const normalizedImages = Array.isArray(record.images)
+    ? record.images.map((item, index) => normalizeImageItem(item, index))
+    : [];
+
+  const layoutType: LayoutType =
+    record.layout_type === "grid" ||
+    record.layout_type === "long-scroll" ||
+    record.layout_type === "horizontal-scroll" ||
+    record.layout_type === "single"
+      ? record.layout_type
+      : defaultBasecardConfig.layout_type;
+
+  const gridMode: GridMode =
+    layoutOptionsInput.grid_mode === "2x2" ||
+    layoutOptionsInput.grid_mode === "3x3" ||
+    layoutOptionsInput.grid_mode === "3-column-infinite"
+      ? layoutOptionsInput.grid_mode
+      : defaultLayoutOptions.grid_mode;
+
+  const scrollMode: ScrollMode =
+    layoutOptionsInput.scroll_mode === "fixed-window" ||
+    layoutOptionsInput.scroll_mode === "adaptive"
+      ? layoutOptionsInput.scroll_mode
+      : defaultLayoutOptions.scroll_mode;
+
+  const singleAlignment: SingleAlignment =
+    layoutOptionsInput.single_alignment === "left" ||
+    layoutOptionsInput.single_alignment === "center" ||
+    layoutOptionsInput.single_alignment === "right"
+      ? layoutOptionsInput.single_alignment
+      : defaultLayoutOptions.single_alignment;
+
+  const heightMode: HeightMode =
+    layoutInput.height_mode === "auto" || layoutInput.height_mode === "fixed"
+      ? layoutInput.height_mode
+      : defaultImageLayoutConfig.height_mode;
+
+  return {
+    card_type: "ImageCard",
+    theme: asString(record.theme) ?? defaultBasecardConfig.theme,
+    layout: {
+      height_mode: heightMode,
+      fixed_height: asPositiveNumber(layoutInput.fixed_height) ?? defaultImageLayoutConfig.fixed_height,
+    },
+    images: normalizedImages,
+    layout_type: layoutType,
+    layout_options: {
+      grid_mode: gridMode,
+      scroll_mode: scrollMode,
+      fixed_window_height:
+        asPositiveNumber(layoutOptionsInput.fixed_window_height) ?? defaultLayoutOptions.fixed_window_height,
+      single_width_percent:
+        asPositiveNumber(layoutOptionsInput.single_width_percent) ?? defaultLayoutOptions.single_width_percent,
+      single_alignment: singleAlignment,
+      gap: asNonNegativeNumber(layoutOptionsInput.gap) ?? defaultLayoutOptions.gap,
+    },
+  };
+}
+
+export function validateBasecardConfig(config: BasecardConfig): ConfigValidationResult {
+  const errors: Record<string, string> = {};
+
+  if (config.card_type !== "ImageCard") {
+    errors.card_type = "card_type х┐Ещб╗ф╕║ ImageCard";
+  }
+
+  if (config.images.length === 0) {
+    errors.images = "шЗ│х░СщЬАшжБф╕Ах╝ахЫ╛чЙЗ";
+  }
+
+  config.images.forEach((image, index) => {
+    if (!isNonEmptyString(image.id)) {
+      errors[`images.${index}.id`] = "хЫ╛чЙЗ ID ф╕НшГ╜ф╕║чй║";
+    }
+
+    if (image.source === "file") {
+      if (!isNonEmptyString(image.file_path)) {
+        errors[`images.${index}.file_path`] = "цЬмхЬ░хЫ╛чЙЗх┐Ещб╗цПРф╛Ы file_path";
+      }
+    } else if (image.source === "url") {
+      if (!isNonEmptyString(image.url)) {
+        errors[`images.${index}.url`] = "ш┐ЬчиЛхЫ╛чЙЗх┐Ещб╗цПРф╛Ы url";
+      } else if (!validateImageUrl(image.url)) {
+        errors[`images.${index}.url`] = "хЫ╛чЙЗ URL ф╕НхРИц│Х";
+      }
+    } else {
+      errors[`images.${index}.source`] = "source х┐Ещб╗ф╕║ file цИЦ url";
+    }
+  });
+
+  const layoutOptions = config.layout_options ?? defaultLayoutOptions;
+  if (layoutOptions.single_width_percent && (layoutOptions.single_width_percent < 10 || layoutOptions.single_width_percent > 100)) {
+    errors.layout_options_single_width_percent = "хНХхЫ╛хо╜х║жх┐Ещб╗хЬи 10 хИ░ 100 ф╣ЛщЧ┤";
+  }
+
+  if (layoutOptions.fixed_window_height && layoutOptions.fixed_window_height <= 0) {
+    errors.layout_options_fixed_window_height = "хЫ║хоЪчкЧхПгщлШх║жх┐Ещб╗хдзф║О 0";
+  }
+
+  if (typeof layoutOptions.gap === "number" && layoutOptions.gap < 0) {
+    errors.layout_options_gap = "хЫ╛чЙЗщЧ┤ш╖Эф╕НшГ╜х░Пф║О 0";
+  }
+
+  if (config.layout?.height_mode === "fixed" && (!config.layout.fixed_height || config.layout.fixed_height <= 0)) {
+    errors.layout_fixed_height = "хЫ║хоЪщлШх║жцибх╝Пх┐Ещб╗цПРф╛Ыхдзф║О 0 чЪД fixed_height";
+  }
+
+  return {
+    valid: Object.keys(errors).length === 0,
+    errors,
+  };
+}

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-BaseCardPlugin/image-BCP/src/shared/utils.ts`**

```diff
@@
-export function isNonEmptyString(value: unknown): value is string {
-  return typeof value === "string" && value.trim().length > 0;
-}
+import type { BasecardConfig, ImageItem, LayoutType } from "../schema/card-config";
+
+const BASE62_ALPHABET = "0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ";
+
+export const ACCEPTED_IMAGE_MIME_TYPES = [
+  "image/jpeg",
+  "image/png",
+  "image/gif",
+  "image/webp",
+  "image/svg+xml",
+] as const;
+
+export function isNonEmptyString(value: unknown): value is string {
+  return typeof value === "string" && value.trim().length > 0;
+}
+
+export function generateImageId(length = 10): string {
+  let id = "";
+  for (let index = 0; index < length; index += 1) {
+    id += BASE62_ALPHABET[Math.floor(Math.random() * BASE62_ALPHABET.length)];
+  }
+  return id;
+}
+
+export function cloneConfig<T>(value: T): T {
+  if (typeof globalThis.structuredClone === "function") {
+    return globalThis.structuredClone(value);
+  }
+
+  return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value)) as T;
+}
+
+export function sanitizeImportedFileName(fileName: string): string {
+  const trimmed = fileName.trim();
+  const sanitized = trimmed
+    .replace(/\\/g, "/")
+    .split("/")
+    .pop()
+    ?.replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*\u0000-\u001f]/g, "")
+    .replace(/\s+/g, "-")
+    .replace(/-+/g, "-")
+    .trim() ?? "";
+
+  return sanitized.length > 0 ? sanitized : "image";
+}
+
+export function normalizeRelativeCardResourcePath(value: unknown): string | undefined {
+  if (!isNonEmptyString(value)) {
+    return undefined;
+  }
+
+  const normalized = value.replace(/\\/g, "/").trim().replace(/^\.?\//, "");
+  if (!normalized) {
+    return undefined;
+  }
+
+  const segments = normalized.split("/").filter(Boolean);
+  if (segments.length === 0 || segments.some((segment) => segment === "." || segment === "..")) {
+    return undefined;
+  }
+
+  return segments.join("/");
+}
+
+export function validateImageUrl(value: string): boolean {
+  if (!isNonEmptyString(value)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  if (/^data:image\//i.test(value)) {
+    return true;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const url = new URL(value);
+    return url.protocol === "http:" || url.protocol === "https:";
+  } catch {
+    return false;
+  }
+}
+
+export function validateImageFormat(mimeType: string, acceptedFormats = ACCEPTED_IMAGE_MIME_TYPES): boolean {
+  return acceptedFormats.includes(mimeType as (typeof ACCEPTED_IMAGE_MIME_TYPES)[number]);
+}
+
+export function validateImageSize(sizeInBytes: number, maxSizeInMb: number): boolean {
+  return sizeInBytes <= maxSizeInMb * 1024 * 1024;
+}
+
+export function getEffectiveLayoutType(config: BasecardConfig): LayoutType {
+  return config.images.length <= 1 ? "single" : config.layout_type;
+}
+
+export function getInternalResourcePaths(config: BasecardConfig): string[] {
+  const paths = new Set<string>();
+  for (const image of config.images) {
+    if (image.source === "file") {
+      const resourcePath = normalizeRelativeCardResourcePath(image.file_path);
+      if (resourcePath) {
+        paths.add(resourcePath);
+      }
+    }
+  }
+  return Array.from(paths);
+}
+
+export function countInternalResourcePaths(images: ImageItem[]): Map<string, number> {
+  const counts = new Map<string, number>();
+
+  for (const image of images) {
+    if (image.source !== "file") {
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    const resourcePath = normalizeRelativeCardResourcePath(image.file_path);
+    if (!resourcePath) {
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    counts.set(resourcePath, (counts.get(resourcePath) ?? 0) + 1);
+  }
+
+  return counts;
+}
+
+export function getRemovedInternalResourcePaths(previous: BasecardConfig, next: BasecardConfig): string[] {
+  const previousCounts = countInternalResourcePaths(previous.images);
+  const nextCounts = countInternalResourcePaths(next.images);
+  const removed: string[] = [];
+
+  for (const [resourcePath, count] of previousCounts.entries()) {
+    const nextCount = nextCounts.get(resourcePath) ?? 0;
+    if (count > 0 && nextCount === 0) {
+      removed.push(resourcePath);
+    }
+  }
+
+  return removed;
+}
+
+export function getImageDisplaySource(
+  image: ImageItem,
+  resolvedFileUrls: Map<string, string>,
+): string {
+  if (image.source === "url") {
+    return image.url ?? "";
+  }
+
+  const resourcePath = normalizeRelativeCardResourcePath(image.file_path);
+  if (!resourcePath) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return resolvedFileUrls.get(resourcePath) ?? resourcePath;
+}
```

**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-BaseCardPlugin/image-BCP/src/shared/i18n.ts`**

```diff
+import enUS from "../../i18n/en-US.json";
+import zhCN from "../../i18n/zh-CN.json";
+
+type Dictionary = Record<string, string>;
+type Locale = "zh-CN" | "en-US";
+
+const dictionaries: Record<Locale, Dictionary> = {
+  "zh-CN": zhCN as Dictionary,
+  "en-US": enUS as Dictionary,
+};
+
+function normalizeLocale(locale: string | undefined): Locale {
+  if (locale === "en-US") {
+    return "en-US";
+  }
+
+  return "zh-CN";
+}
+
+function interpolate(template: string, params?: Record<string, string | number>): string {
+  if (!params) {
+    return template;
+  }
+
+  return template.replace(/\{(\w+)\}/g, (_, key: string) => String(params[key] ?? ""));
+}
+
+export function createTranslator(locale?: string) {
+  const dictionary = dictionaries[normalizeLocale(locale)];
+
+  return (key: string, params?: Record<string, string | number>): string => {
+    const template = dictionary[key] ?? key;
+    return interpolate(template, params);
+  };
+}
```

```diff
+import React, { useRef } from "react";
+import type { BasecardConfig, GridMode, ImageItem } from "../schema/card-config";
+import { defaultLayoutOptions } from "../schema/card-config";
+import { createTranslator } from "../shared/i18n";
+import { getEffectiveLayoutType } from "../shared/utils";
+
+export const VIEW_STYLE_TEXT = `
+.chips-image-card {
+  width: 100%;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #0f172a);
+  font: 14px/1.5 var(--chips-font-family-sans, "SF Pro Text", "PingFang SC", sans-serif);
+}
+
+.chips-image-card *,
+.chips-image-card *::before,
+.chips-image-card *::after {
+  box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__surface {
+  width: 100%;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__empty {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  min-height: 220px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--chips-comp-card-shell-border-color, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14));
+  border-radius: 24px;
+  background:
+    radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.09), transparent 52%),
+    var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff);
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__empty-text {
+  padding: 20px;
+  text-align: center;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__single {
+  display: flex;
+  width: 100%;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__image-frame {
+  position: relative;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  border-radius: 22px;
+  background:
+    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.02)),
+    var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff);
+  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.10);
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__image {
+  display: block;
+  width: 100%;
+  height: auto;
+  object-fit: cover;
+  user-select: none;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__image--fill {
+  height: 100%;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__image--dimmed {
+  filter: brightness(0.48);
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__placeholder {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  min-height: 180px;
+  padding: 20px;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+  text-align: center;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__grid {
+  display: grid;
+  width: 100%;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__grid-cell {
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__grid-cell .chips-image-card__image-frame {
+  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__overflow-badge {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  font-size: 28px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  color: #ffffff;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.22), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.62));
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__long-scroll {
+  width: 100%;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__long-scroll[data-scroll-mode="fixed-window"] {
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  overscroll-behavior: contain;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__long-scroll-stack {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__long-scroll-stack .chips-image-card__image-frame {
+  width: 100%;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__horizontal {
+  width: 100%;
+  overflow-x: auto;
+  overflow-y: hidden;
+  overscroll-behavior-x: contain;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__horizontal-track {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: stretch;
+  width: max-content;
+  min-width: 100%;
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__horizontal-item {
+  flex: 0 0 auto;
+  width: min(76vw, 560px);
+}
+
+.chips-image-card__horizontal-item .chips-image-card__image-frame {
+  width: 100%;
+  height: 100%;
+}
+`;
+
+interface ImageCardViewProps {
+  config: BasecardConfig;
+}
+
+function ImageFrame(props: {
+  image: ImageItem;
+  src: string;
+  fillHeight?: boolean;
+  dimmed?: boolean;
+  placeholderText: string;
+  aspectRatio?: string;
+}) {
+  const { image, src, fillHeight = false, dimmed = false, placeholderText, aspectRatio } = props;
+
+  return (
+    <div className="chips-image-card__image-frame" style={aspectRatio ? { aspectRatio } : undefined}>
+      {src ? (
+        <img
+          src={src}
+          alt={image.alt ?? ""}
+          title={image.title ?? ""}
+          className={[
+            "chips-image-card__image",
+            fillHeight ? "chips-image-card__image--fill" : "",
+            dimmed ? "chips-image-card__image--dimmed" : "",
+          ].filter(Boolean).join(" ")}
+          loading="lazy"
+          draggable={false}
+        />
+      ) : (
+        <div className="chips-image-card__placeholder">{placeholderText}</div>
+      )}
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+
+function getGridColumns(gridMode: GridMode): number {
+  if (gridMode === "2x2") {
+    return 2;
+  }
+
+  return 3;
+}
+
+function getGridDisplayLimit(gridMode: GridMode): number {
+  switch (gridMode) {
+    case "2x2":
+      return 4;
+    case "3x3":
+      return 9;
+    default:
+      return Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
+  }
+}
+
+export function ImageCardView({ config }: ImageCardViewProps) {
+  const t = createTranslator(typeof navigator !== "undefined" ? navigator.language : "zh-CN");
+  const horizontalRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
+  const effectiveLayoutType = getEffectiveLayoutType(config);
+  const layoutOptions = config.layout_options ?? defaultLayoutOptions;
+  const gap = layoutOptions.gap ?? defaultLayoutOptions.gap;
+  const wrapperStyle = config.layout?.height_mode === "fixed" && config.layout.fixed_height
+    ? { height: `${config.layout.fixed_height}px`, overflow: "auto" as const }
+    : undefined;
+
+  const handleHorizontalWheel: React.WheelEventHandler<HTMLDivElement> = (event) => {
+    if (!horizontalRef.current) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    horizontalRef.current.scrollLeft += event.deltaY;
+  };
+
+  if (config.images.length === 0) {
+    return (
+      <div className="chips-image-card">
+        <div className="chips-image-card__empty">
+          <span className="chips-image-card__empty-text">{t("image.empty")}</span>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (effectiveLayoutType === "single") {
+    const singleImage = config.images[0];
+    const alignment = layoutOptions.single_alignment ?? defaultLayoutOptions.single_alignment;
+    const justifyContent = alignment === "left" ? "flex-start" : alignment === "right" ? "flex-end" : "center";
+    const widthPercent = layoutOptions.single_width_percent ?? defaultLayoutOptions.single_width_percent;
+
+    return (
+      <div className="chips-image-card">
+        <div className="chips-image-card__surface" style={wrapperStyle}>
+          <div className="chips-image-card__single" style={{ justifyContent }}>
+            {singleImage ? (
+              <div style={{ width: `${widthPercent}%`, maxWidth: "100%" }}>
+                <ImageFrame
+                  image={singleImage}
+                  src={singleImage.source === "url" ? singleImage.url ?? "" : singleImage.file_path ?? ""}
+                  placeholderText={t("image.unavailable")}
+                />
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (effectiveLayoutType === "grid") {
+    const gridMode = layoutOptions.grid_mode ?? defaultLayoutOptions.grid_mode;
+    const displayLimit = getGridDisplayLimit(gridMode);
+    const hasOverflow = Number.isFinite(displayLimit) && config.images.length > displayLimit;
+    const displayImages = hasOverflow ? config.images.slice(0, displayLimit) : config.images;
+    const overflowCount = hasOverflow ? config.images.length - displayLimit + 1 : 0;
+
+    return (
+      <div className="chips-image-card">
+        <div className="chips-image-card__surface" style={wrapperStyle}>
+          <div
+            className="chips-image-card__grid"
+            style={{ gap: `${gap}px`, gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${getGridColumns(gridMode)}, minmax(0, 1fr))` }}
+          >
+            {displayImages.map((image, index) => {
+              const isOverflowCell = hasOverflow && index === displayImages.length - 1;
+              const src = image.source === "url" ? image.url ?? "" : image.file_path ?? "";
+
+              return (
+                <div key={image.id} className="chips-image-card__grid-cell">
+                  <ImageFrame
+                    image={image}
+                    src={src}
+                    dimmed={isOverflowCell}
+                    fillHeight={true}
+                    aspectRatio="1 / 1"
+                    placeholderText={t("image.unavailable")}
+                  />
+                  {isOverflowCell ? (
+                    <div className="chips-image-card__overflow-badge">+{overflowCount}</div>
+                  ) : null}
+                </div>
+              );
+            })}
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (effectiveLayoutType === "long-scroll") {
+    const scrollMode = layoutOptions.scroll_mode ?? defaultLayoutOptions.scroll_mode;
+    const fixedHeight = layoutOptions.fixed_window_height ?? defaultLayoutOptions.fixed_window_height;
+
+    return (
+      <div className="chips-image-card">
+        <div
+          className="chips-image-card__surface chips-image-card__long-scroll"
+          data-scroll-mode={scrollMode}
+          style={scrollMode === "fixed-window" ? { maxHeight: `${fixedHeight}px` } : wrapperStyle}
+        >
+          <div className="chips-image-card__long-scroll-stack" style={{ gap: `${gap}px` }}>
+            {config.images.map((image) => (
+              <ImageFrame
+                key={image.id}
+                image={image}
+                src={image.source === "url" ? image.url ?? "" : image.file_path ?? ""}
+                placeholderText={t("image.unavailable")}
+              />
+            ))}
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <div className="chips-image-card">
+      <div className="chips-image-card__surface" style={wrapperStyle}>
+        <div
+          ref={horizontalRef}
+          className="chips-image-card__horizontal"
+          onWheel={handleHorizontalWheel}
+        >
+          <div className="chips-image-card__horizontal-track" style={{ gap: `${gap}px` }}>
+            {config.images.map((image) => (
+              <div key={image.id} className="chips-image-card__horizontal-item">
+                <ImageFrame
+                  image={image}
+                  src={image.source === "url" ? image.url ?? "" : image.file_path ?? ""}
+                  fillHeight={true}
+                  placeholderText={t("image.unavailable")}
+                />
+              </div>
+            ))}
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
```

+import React from "react";
+import { flushSync } from "react-dom";
+import { createRoot, type Root } from "react-dom/client";
+import type { BasecardRenderContext } from "../index";
+import type { BasecardConfig } from "../schema/card-config";
+import { ImageCardView, VIEW_STYLE_TEXT } from "./view";
+
+type MountState = {
+  root: Root;
+};
+
+export function mountBasecardView(ctx: BasecardRenderContext): () => void {
+  const { container, config, themeCssText } = ctx;
+
+  while (container.firstChild) {
+    container.removeChild(container.firstChild);
+  }
+
+  const mountNode = document.createElement("div");
+  mountNode.setAttribute("data-chips-image-view-root", "true");
+  mountNode.style.width = "100%";
+  container.appendChild(mountNode);
+
+  const state: MountState = {
+    root: createRoot(mountNode),
+  };
+
+  flushSync(() => {
+    state.root.render(
+      <>
+        <style>{`${themeCssText ?? ""}\n${VIEW_STYLE_TEXT}`}</style>
+        <ImageCardView config={config as BasecardConfig} />
+      </>,
+    );
+  });
+
+  return () => {
+    state.root.unmount();
+    while (container.firstChild) {
+      container.removeChild(container.firstChild);
+    }
+  };
+}

+import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
+import type {
+  BasecardConfig,
+  ImageItem,
+  LayoutOptions,
+  LayoutType,
+  SingleAlignment,
+} from "../schema/card-config";
+import {
+  defaultBasecardConfig,
+  defaultLayoutOptions,
+  normalizeBasecardConfig,
+  validateBasecardConfig,
+} from "../schema/card-config";
+import { createTranslator } from "../shared/i18n";
+import {
+  cloneConfig,
+  generateImageId,
+  getImageDisplaySource,
+  getRemovedInternalResourcePaths,
+  sanitizeImportedFileName,
+  validateImageFormat,
+  validateImageSize,
+  validateImageUrl,
+} from "../shared/utils";
+
+export interface BasecardEditorProps {
+  initialConfig: BasecardConfig;
+  onChange: (next: BasecardConfig) => void;
+  resolveResourceUrl?: (resourcePath: string) => Promise<string>;
+  releaseResourceUrl?: (resourcePath: string) => Promise<void> | void;
+  importResource?: (input: { file: File; preferredPath?: string }) => Promise<{ path: string }>;
+  deleteResource?: (resourcePath: string) => Promise<void>;
+}
+
+const MAX_HISTORY = 100;
+const MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB = 10;
+
+export const EDITOR_STYLE_TEXT = `
+html, body {
+  margin: 0;
+  width: 100%;
+  height: 100%;
+  min-height: 0;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  background: var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #f8fafc);
+}
+
+#chips-basecard-editor-root {
+  width: 100%;
+  height: 100%;
+  min-height: 0;
+  display: flex;
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  width: 100%;
+  height: 100%;
+  min-height: 0;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  padding: 14px;
+  background:
+    radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.08), transparent 34%),
+    var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #f8fafc);
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #0f172a);
+  font: 14px/1.5 var(--chips-font-family-sans, "SF Pro Text", "PingFang SC", sans-serif);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor *,
+.chips-image-editor *::before,
+.chips-image-editor *::after {
+  box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__toolbar {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 12px;
+  flex: 0 0 auto;
+  padding: 12px 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--chips-comp-card-shell-border-color, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12));
+  border-radius: 22px;
+  background: var(--chips-comp-card-shell-root-surface, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.86));
+  box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__toolbar-left,
+.chips-image-editor__toolbar-right,
+.chips-image-editor__toolbar-actions {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__icon-button,
+.chips-image-editor__button,
+.chips-image-editor__layout-button,
+.chips-image-editor__chip {
+  border: 1px solid var(--chips-comp-card-shell-border-color, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12));
+  background: var(--chips-comp-card-shell-root-surface, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94));
+  color: inherit;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition:
+    border-color 0.16s ease,
+    box-shadow 0.16s ease,
+    transform 0.16s ease,
+    background-color 0.16s ease;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__icon-button {
+  display: inline-grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  width: 34px;
+  height: 34px;
+  padding: 0;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__button,
+.chips-image-editor__chip {
+  min-height: 36px;
+  padding: 0 12px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  font: inherit;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__layout-button {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  align-items: flex-start;
+  gap: 6px;
+  min-height: 98px;
+  padding: 12px;
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  text-align: left;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__icon-button:hover,
+.chips-image-editor__button:hover,
+.chips-image-editor__layout-button:hover,
+.chips-image-editor__chip:hover {
+  border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.48);
+  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.10);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__icon-button:disabled,
+.chips-image-editor__button:disabled {
+  cursor: not-allowed;
+  opacity: 0.45;
+  box-shadow: none;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__layout-button--active,
+.chips-image-editor__chip--active {
+  border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.55);
+  background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.08);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__badge {

+}

+  min-width: 0;

+  overflow: auto;
+  padding-right: 4px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__preview {
+  flex: 0 0 min(32%, 320px);
+  min-width: 260px;
+  min-height: 0;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding: 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--chips-comp-card-shell-border-color, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12));
+  border-radius: 26px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.74);
+  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__preview-title {
+  margin: 0 0 12px;
+  font-size: 13px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #475569);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__preview-card {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__preview-image {
+  width: 100%;
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.015));
+  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__preview-image img {
+  display: block;
+  width: 100%;
+  height: auto;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__preview-empty {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  min-height: 220px;
+  border: 1px dashed rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14);
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 24px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__panel {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 12px;
+  padding: 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--chips-comp-card-shell-border-color, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12));
+  border-radius: 24px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82);
+  box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__panel-header {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__panel-title {
+  margin: 0;
+  font-size: 15px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__panel-subtitle {
+  margin: 4px 0 0;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__dropzone {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 12px;
+  padding: 16px;
+  border: 1px dashed rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.38);
+  border-radius: 22px;
+  background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.04);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__dropzone--dragover {
+  border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.72);
+  background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.10);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__dropzone-row,
+.chips-image-editor__field-row,
+.chips-image-editor__inline-fields,
+.chips-image-editor__list-actions,
+.chips-image-editor__layout-grid,
+.chips-image-editor__segmented {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 10px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__field,
+.chips-image-editor__select,
+.chips-image-editor__number {
+  width: 100%;
+  min-height: 40px;
+  padding: 0 12px;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12);
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
+  color: inherit;
+  font: inherit;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__field-row .chips-image-editor__field {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 180px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__inline-fields > * {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 130px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__helper,
+.chips-image-editor__error-list {
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 0;
+  list-style: none;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__error-list {
+  color: #b91c1c;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__uploading {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 10px;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #475569);
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__progress {
+  flex: 1;
+  height: 8px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__progress-bar {
+  height: 100%;
+  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #0ea5e9);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__layout-grid > * {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-width: 160px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__layout-icon {
+  font-size: 20px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__layout-name {
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__layout-desc {
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__list {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__list-empty {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  min-height: 180px;
+  border: 1px dashed rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14);
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 72px minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
+  gap: 12px;
+  padding: 12px;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.10);
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
+  transition: border-color 0.16s ease, transform 0.16s ease, box-shadow 0.16s ease;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__item--selected {
+  border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.52);
+  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.10);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__item--dragging {
+  opacity: 0.55;
+  transform: scale(0.99);
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__thumb {
+  width: 72px;
+  height: 72px;
+  border-radius: 18px;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.015));
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__thumb img {
+  width: 100%;
+  height: 100%;
+  object-fit: cover;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__thumb-placeholder {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  width: 100%;
+  height: 100%;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+  font-size: 11px;
+  text-align: center;
+  padding: 8px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__item-fields {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 8px;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__meta {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 8px;
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface-variant, #64748b);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__item-actions {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.chips-image-editor__danger {
+  color: #b91c1c;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 920px) {
+  .chips-image-editor__body {
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .chips-image-editor__preview {
+    min-width: 0;
+    flex-basis: auto;
+  }
+}
+`;
+
+type HistoryStack = BasecardConfig[];
+
+type EditorRoot = HTMLElement & {
+  __chipsDispose?: () => void;
+};
+
+function cloneHistory(history: HistoryStack): HistoryStack {
+  return history.map((snapshot) => cloneConfig(snapshot));
+}
+
+function normalizeDraft(config: BasecardConfig): BasecardConfig {
+  return normalizeBasecardConfig(config);
+}
+
+function buildReplacementTitle(fileName: string): string {
+  return fileName.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, "");
+}
+
+function moveItem(images: ImageItem[], fromIndex: number, toIndex: number): ImageItem[] {
+  const next = images.map((image) => ({ ...image }));
+  const [moved] = next.splice(fromIndex, 1);
+  if (!moved) {
+    return next;
+  }
+  next.splice(toIndex, 0, moved);
+  return next;
+}
+
+export function ImageCardEditor(props: BasecardEditorProps) {
+  const {
+    initialConfig,
+    onChange,
+    resolveResourceUrl,
+    releaseResourceUrl,
+    importResource,
+    deleteResource,
+  } = props;
+
+  const initialDraft = normalizeDraft(initialConfig);
+  const [draft, setDraft] = useState<BasecardConfig>(initialDraft);
+  const [historyPast, setHistoryPast] = useState<HistoryStack>([]);
+  const [historyFuture, setHistoryFuture] = useState<HistoryStack>([]);
+  const [resolvedFileUrls, setResolvedFileUrls] = useState<Map<string, string>>(new Map());
+  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0);
+  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);
+  const [isDragover, setIsDragover] = useState(false);
+  const [selectedImageId, setSelectedImageId] = useState<string | null>(null);
+  const [draggingImageId, setDraggingImageId] = useState<string | null>(null);
+  const [showUploader, setShowUploader] = useState(initialDraft.images.length === 0);
+  const [urlInput, setUrlInput] = useState("");
+  const [message, setMessage] = useState("");
+  const [replaceTargetId, setReplaceTargetId] = useState<string | null>(null);
+
+  const addFileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement | null>(null);
+  const replaceFileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement | null>(null);
+  const draftRef = useRef<BasecardConfig>(initialDraft);
+  const resolvedFileUrlsRef = useRef<Map<string, string>>(new Map());
+  const t = createTranslator(typeof navigator !== "undefined" ? navigator.language : "zh-CN");
+  const validation = validateBasecardConfig(draft);
+  const selectedImage = draft.images.find((image) => image.id === selectedImageId) ?? null;
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    draftRef.current = draft;
+  }, [draft]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    let disposed = false;
+    const neededPaths = new Set(
+      draft.images
+        .filter((image) => image.source === "file" && typeof image.file_path === "string")
+        .map((image) => image.file_path as string),
+    );
+
+    for (const existingPath of Array.from(resolvedFileUrlsRef.current.keys())) {
+      if (neededPaths.has(existingPath)) {
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      resolvedFileUrlsRef.current.delete(existingPath);
+      void Promise.resolve(releaseResourceUrl?.(existingPath)).catch(() => undefined);
+    }
+
+    const resolveAll = async () => {
+      for (const resourcePath of Array.from(neededPaths)) {
+        if (resolvedFileUrlsRef.current.has(resourcePath)) {
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        try {
+          const resolvedUrl = resolveResourceUrl
+            ? await resolveResourceUrl(resourcePath)
+            : resourcePath;
+          if (disposed) {
+            void Promise.resolve(releaseResourceUrl?.(resourcePath)).catch(() => undefined);
+            return;
+          }
+          resolvedFileUrlsRef.current.set(resourcePath, resolvedUrl);
+        } catch {
+          if (disposed) {
+            return;
+          }
+          resolvedFileUrlsRef.current.delete(resourcePath);
+        }
+      }
+
+      if (!disposed) {
+        setResolvedFileUrls(new Map(resolvedFileUrlsRef.current));
+      }
+    };
+
+    void resolveAll();
+
+    return () => {
+      disposed = true;
+    };
+  }, [draft.images, releaseResourceUrl, resolveResourceUrl]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    return () => {
+      for (const resourcePath of Array.from(resolvedFileUrlsRef.current.keys())) {
+        void Promise.resolve(releaseResourceUrl?.(resourcePath)).catch(() => undefined);
+      }
+      resolvedFileUrlsRef.current.clear();
+    };
+  }, [releaseResourceUrl]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
+      const target = event.target as HTMLElement | null;
+      const isTypingTarget = target?.tagName === "INPUT" || target?.tagName === "TEXTAREA";
+      const metaPressed = event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey;
+
+      if (metaPressed && event.key.toLowerCase() === "z") {
+        event.preventDefault();
+        if (event.shiftKey) {
+          if (historyFuture.length > 0) {
+            const next = historyFuture[0];
+            if (!next) {
+              return;
+            }
+            setHistoryFuture((current) => current.slice(1));
+            setHistoryPast((current) => [...current, cloneConfig(draftRef.current)].slice(-MAX_HISTORY));
+            applyDraft(next, { pushHistory: false, replaceMessage: "" });
+          }
+          return;
+        }
+
+        if (historyPast.length > 0) {
+          const previous = historyPast[historyPast.length - 1];
+          if (!previous) {
+            return;
+          }
+          setHistoryPast((current) => current.slice(0, -1));
+          setHistoryFuture((current) => [cloneConfig(draftRef.current), ...current].slice(0, MAX_HISTORY));
+          applyDraft(previous, { pushHistory: false, replaceMessage: "" });
+        }
+        return;
+      }
+
+      if (metaPressed && event.key.toLowerCase() === "y" && historyFuture.length > 0) {
+        event.preventDefault();
+        const next = historyFuture[0];
+        if (!next) {
+          return;
+        }
+        setHistoryFuture((current) => current.slice(1));
+        setHistoryPast((current) => [...current, cloneConfig(draftRef.current)].slice(-MAX_HISTORY));
+        applyDraft(next, { pushHistory: false, replaceMessage: "" });
+        return;
+      }
+
+      if (event.key === "Delete" && selectedImageId && !isTypingTarget) {
+        event.preventDefault();
+        removeImage(selectedImageId);
+      }
+    };
+
+    document.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
+    return () => {
+      document.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
+    };
+  }, [historyFuture, historyPast, selectedImageId]);
+
+  function applyDraft(
+    nextInput: BasecardConfig,
+    options?: {
+      pushHistory?: boolean;
+      replaceMessage?: string;
+    },
+  ): void {
+    const previous = draftRef.current;
+    const next = normalizeDraft(nextInput);
+    if (JSON.stringify(previous) === JSON.stringify(next)) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const removedResourcePaths = getRemovedInternalResourcePaths(previous, next);
+    for (const resourcePath of removedResourcePaths) {
+      void Promise.resolve(deleteResource?.(resourcePath)).catch(() => undefined);
+    }
+
+    if (options?.pushHistory !== false) {
+      setHistoryPast((current) => [...cloneHistory(current), cloneConfig(previous)].slice(-MAX_HISTORY));
+      setHistoryFuture([]);
+    }
+
+    if (!next.images.some((image) => image.id === selectedImageId)) {
+      setSelectedImageId(next.images[0]?.id ?? null);
+    }
+
+    draftRef.current = next;
+    setDraft(next);
+    onChange(next);
+    setMessage(options?.replaceMessage ?? "");
+  }
+
+  async function importFiles(files: File[]): Promise<void> {
+    if (files.length === 0) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!importResource) {
+      setMessage(t("editor.importUnavailable"));
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setIsUploading(true);
+    setUploadProgress(0);
+    setMessage("");
+
+    const importedItems: ImageItem[] = [];
+
+    for (let index = 0; index < files.length; index += 1) {
+      const file = files[index];
+      if (!file) {
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      if (!validateImageFormat(file.type)) {
+        setMessage(t("editor.invalidFormat", { file: file.name }));
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      if (!validateImageSize(file.size, MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB)) {
+        setMessage(t("editor.invalidSize", { file: file.name, max: MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB }));
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      try {
+        const imported = await importResource({
+          file,
+          preferredPath: sanitizeImportedFileName(file.name),
+        });
+
+        importedItems.push({
+          id: generateImageId(),
+          source: "file",
+          file_path: imported.path,
+          alt: "",
+          title: buildReplacementTitle(file.name),
+        });
+      } catch (error) {
+        setMessage(error instanceof Error ? error.message : t("editor.importFailed"));
+      }
+
+      setUploadProgress(Math.round(((index + 1) / files.length) * 100));
+    }
+
+    setIsUploading(false);
+    setUploadProgress(0);
+    setShowUploader(importedItems.length === 0 && draftRef.current.images.length === 0);
+
+    if (importedItems.length === 0) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    applyDraft({
+      ...draftRef.current,
+      images: [...draftRef.current.images, ...importedItems],
+    }, {
+      replaceMessage: t("editor.importSuccess", { count: importedItems.length }),
+    });
+  }
+
+  async function handleReplaceFile(file: File, imageId: string): Promise<void> {
+    if (!importResource) {
+      setMessage(t("editor.importUnavailable"));
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const currentImage = draftRef.current.images.find((image) => image.id === imageId);
+    if (!currentImage) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!validateImageFormat(file.type)) {
+      setMessage(t("editor.invalidFormat", { file: file.name }));
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!validateImageSize(file.size, MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB)) {
+      setMessage(t("editor.invalidSize", { file: file.name, max: MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB }));
+      return;
+    }
+
+    try {
+      const imported = await importResource({
+        file,
+        preferredPath: sanitizeImportedFileName(file.name),
+      });
+
+      const nextImages = draftRef.current.images.map((image) => {
+        if (image.id !== imageId) {
+          return image;
+        }
+
+        return {
+          ...image,
+          source: "file" as const,
+          file_path: imported.path,
+          url: undefined,
+          title: image.title || buildReplacementTitle(file.name),
+        };
+      });
+
+      applyDraft({
+        ...draftRef.current,
+        images: nextImages,
+      }, {
+        replaceMessage: t("editor.replaceSuccess", { title: currentImage.title || buildReplacementTitle(file.name) }),
+      });
+    } catch (error) {
+      setMessage(error instanceof Error ? error.message : t("editor.importFailed"));
+    }
+  }
+
+  function addImageByUrl(): void {
+    const normalizedUrl = urlInput.trim();
+    if (!validateImageUrl(normalizedUrl)) {
+      setMessage(t("editor.invalidUrl"));
+      return;
+    }
+
+    applyDraft({
+      ...draftRef.current,
+      images: [
+        ...draftRef.current.images,
+        {
+          id: generateImageId(),
+          source: "url",
+          url: normalizedUrl,
+          alt: "",
+          title: "",
+        },
+      ],
+    }, {
+      replaceMessage: "",
+    });
+    setUrlInput("");
+    setShowUploader(false);
+  }
+
+  function updateImage(imageId: string, updates: Partial<ImageItem>): void {
+    applyDraft({
+      ...draftRef.current,
+      images: draftRef.current.images.map((image) => {
+        if (image.id !== imageId) {
+          return image;
+        }
+
+        return {
+          ...image,
+          ...updates,
+        };
+      }),
+    }, {
+      replaceMessage: "",
+    });
+  }
+
+  function removeImage(imageId: string): void {
+    applyDraft({
+      ...draftRef.current,
+      images: draftRef.current.images.filter((image) => image.id !== imageId),
+    }, {
+      replaceMessage: "",
+    });
+  }
+
+  function clearAllImages(): void {
+    applyDraft({
+      ...draftRef.current,
+      images: [],
+    }, {
+      replaceMessage: "",
+    });
+    setShowUploader(true);
+  }
+
+  function moveImage(imageId: string, targetIndex: number): void {
+    const fromIndex = draftRef.current.images.findIndex((image) => image.id === imageId);
+    if (fromIndex < 0 || targetIndex < 0 || targetIndex >= draftRef.current.images.length) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    applyDraft({
+      ...draftRef.current,
+      images: moveItem(draftRef.current.images, fromIndex, targetIndex),
+    }, {
+      replaceMessage: "",
+    });
+  }
+
+  function updateLayout(updates: Partial<LayoutOptions>): void {
+    applyDraft({
+      ...draftRef.current,
+      layout_options: {
+        ...draftRef.current.layout_options,
+        ...updates,
+      },
+    }, {
+      replaceMessage: "",
+    });
+  }
+
+  function setLayoutType(nextLayoutType: LayoutType): void {
+    applyDraft({
+      ...draftRef.current,
+      layout_type: nextLayoutType,
+    }, {
+      replaceMessage: "",
+    });
+  }
+
+  const currentLayoutType = draft.images.length <= 1 ? "single" : draft.layout_type;
+  const layoutOptions = draft.layout_options ?? defaultLayoutOptions;
+
+  return (
+    <div className="chips-image-editor">
+      <div className="chips-image-editor__toolbar">
+        <div className="chips-image-editor__toolbar-left">
+          <button
+            type="button"
+            className="chips-image-editor__icon-button"
+            disabled={historyPast.length === 0}
+            onClick={() => {
+              const previous = historyPast[historyPast.length - 1];
+              if (!previous) {
+                return;
+              }
+              setHistoryPast((current) => current.slice(0, -1));
+              setHistoryFuture((current) => [cloneConfig(draftRef.current), ...current].slice(0, MAX_HISTORY));
+              applyDraft(previous, { pushHistory: false, replaceMessage: "" });
+            }}
+            aria-label={t("editor.undo")}
+            title={t("editor.undo")}
+          >
+            тЖ╢
+          </button>
+          <button
+            type="button"
+            className="chips-image-editor__icon-button"
+            disabled={historyFuture.length === 0}
+            onClick={() => {
+              const next = historyFuture[0];
+              if (!next) {
+                return;
+              }
+              setHistoryFuture((current) => current.slice(1));
+              setHistoryPast((current) => [...current, cloneConfig(draftRef.current)].slice(-MAX_HISTORY));
+              applyDraft(next, { pushHistory: false, replaceMessage: "" });
+            }}
+            aria-label={t("editor.redo")}
+            title={t("editor.redo")}
+          >
+            тЖ╖
+          </button>
+        </div>
+        <div className="chips-image-editor__toolbar-right">
+          <span className="chips-image-editor__badge">
+            {t("editor.imageCount", { count: draft.images.length })}
+          </span>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+
+      <div className="chips-image-editor__body">
+        <div className="chips-image-editor__main">
+          <section className="chips-image-editor__panel">
+            <div className="chips-image-editor__panel-header">
+              <div>
+                <h2 className="chips-image-editor__panel-title">{t("editor.addImages")}</h2>
+                <p className="chips-image-editor__panel-subtitle">{t("editor.addImagesHint")}</p>
+              </div>
+              {draft.images.length > 0 ? (
+                <button
+                  type="button"
+                  className="chips-image-editor__chip"
+                  onClick={() => setShowUploader((current) => !current)}
+                >
+                  {showUploader ? t("editor.collapseUploader") : t("editor.expandUploader")}
+                </button>
+              ) : null}
+            </div>
+
+            {showUploader ? (
+              <div
+                className={[
+                  "chips-image-editor__dropzone",
+                  isDragover ? "chips-image-editor__dropzone--dragover" : "",
+                ].filter(Boolean).join(" ")}
+                onDragOver={(event) => {
+                  event.preventDefault();
+                  setIsDragover(true);
+                }}
+                onDragLeave={(event) => {
+                  event.preventDefault();
+                  setIsDragover(false);
+                }}
+                onDrop={(event) => {
+                  event.preventDefault();
+                  setIsDragover(false);
+                  const files = Array.from(event.dataTransfer.files);
+                  void importFiles(files);
+                }}
+              >
+                <input
+                  ref={addFileInputRef}
+                  type="file"
+                  accept={Array.from(["image/jpeg", "image/png", "image/gif", "image/webp", "image/svg+xml"]).join(",")}
+                  multiple
+                  hidden
+                  onChange={(event) => {
+                    const files = Array.from(event.target.files ?? []);
+                    event.currentTarget.value = "";
+                    void importFiles(files);
+                  }}
+                />
+                <div className="chips-image-editor__dropzone-row">
+                  <button
+                    type="button"
+                    className="chips-image-editor__button"
+                    onClick={() => addFileInputRef.current?.click()}
+                  >
+                    {t("editor.chooseFiles")}
+                  </button>
+                  <span className="chips-image-editor__helper">{t("editor.dropHint")}</span>
+                </div>
+
+                {isUploading ? (
+                  <div className="chips-image-editor__uploading">
+                    <span>{t("editor.uploading")}</span>
+                    <div className="chips-image-editor__progress">
+                      <div className="chips-image-editor__progress-bar" style={{ width: `${uploadProgress}%` }} />
+                    </div>
+                    <span>{uploadProgress}%</span>
+                  </div>
+                ) : null}
+
+                <div className="chips-image-editor__field-row">
+                  <input
+                    type="url"
+                    className="chips-image-editor__field"
+                    placeholder={t("editor.urlPlaceholder")}
+                    value={urlInput}
+                    onChange={(event) => setUrlInput(event.target.value)}
+                    onKeyDown={(event) => {
+                      if (event.key === "Enter") {
+                        event.preventDefault();
+                        addImageByUrl();
+                      }
+                    }}
+                  />
+                  <button
+                    type="button"
+                    className="chips-image-editor__button"
+                    disabled={urlInput.trim().length === 0}
+                    onClick={addImageByUrl}
+                  >
+                    {t("editor.addByUrl")}
+                  </button>
+                </div>
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+
+            {message ? (
+              <ul className="chips-image-editor__error-list">
+                <li>{message}</li>
+              </ul>
+            ) : null}
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="chips-image-editor__panel">
+            <div className="chips-image-editor__panel-header">
+              <div>
+                <h2 className="chips-image-editor__panel-title">{t("editor.layoutTitle")}</h2>
+                <p className="chips-image-editor__panel-subtitle">{t("editor.layoutHint")}</p>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="chips-image-editor__layout-grid">
+              {([
+                { value: "single", icon: "тЦг", label: t("layout.single"), desc: t("layout.singleDesc") },
+                { value: "grid", icon: "тЦж", label: t("layout.grid"), desc: t("layout.gridDesc") },
+                { value: "long-scroll", icon: "тЦд", label: t("layout.longScroll"), desc: t("layout.longScrollDesc") },
+                { value: "horizontal-scroll", icon: "тЦн", label: t("layout.horizontal"), desc: t("layout.horizontalDesc") },
+              ] as const).map((layout) => (
+                <button
+                  key={layout.value}
+                  type="button"
+                  className={[
+                    "chips-image-editor__layout-button",
+                    currentLayoutType === layout.value ? "chips-image-editor__layout-button--active" : "",
+                  ].filter(Boolean).join(" ")}
+                  disabled={layout.value !== "single" && draft.images.length <= 1}
+                  onClick={() => setLayoutType(layout.value)}
+                >
+                  <span className="chips-image-editor__layout-icon">{layout.icon}</span>
+                  <span className="chips-image-editor__layout-name">{layout.label}</span>
+                  <span className="chips-image-editor__layout-desc">{layout.desc}</span>
+                </button>
+              ))}
+            </div>
+
+            {currentLayoutType === "grid" ? (
+              <div className="chips-image-editor__field-row">
+                <select
+                  className="chips-image-editor__select"
+                  value={layoutOptions.grid_mode}
+                  onChange={(event) => updateLayout({ grid_mode: event.target.value as LayoutOptions["grid_mode"] })}
+                >
+                  <option value="2x2">{t("layout.grid2x2")}</option>
+                  <option value="3x3">{t("layout.grid3x3")}</option>
+                  <option value="3-column-infinite">{t("layout.gridInfinite")}</option>
+                </select>
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min={0}
+                  max={64}
+                  className="chips-image-editor__number"
+                  value={layoutOptions.gap}
+                  onChange={(event) => updateLayout({ gap: Number(event.target.value) || 0 })}
+                />
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+
+            {currentLayoutType === "long-scroll" ? (
+              <div className="chips-image-editor__inline-fields">
+                <select
+                  className="chips-image-editor__select"
+                  value={layoutOptions.scroll_mode}
+                  onChange={(event) => updateLayout({ scroll_mode: event.target.value as LayoutOptions["scroll_mode"] })}
+                >
+                  <option value="fixed-window">{t("layout.fixedWindow")}</option>
+                  <option value="adaptive">{t("layout.adaptive")}</option>
+                </select>
+                {layoutOptions.scroll_mode === "fixed-window" ? (
+                  <input
+                    type="number"
+                    min={200}
+                    max={2400}
+                    className="chips-image-editor__number"
+                    value={layoutOptions.fixed_window_height}
+                    onChange={(event) => updateLayout({ fixed_window_height: Number(event.target.value) || 600 })}
+                  />
+                ) : null}
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min={0}
+                  max={64}
+                  className="chips-image-editor__number"
+                  value={layoutOptions.gap}
+                  onChange={(event) => updateLayout({ gap: Number(event.target.value) || 0 })}
+                />
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+
+            {currentLayoutType === "horizontal-scroll" ? (
+              <div className="chips-image-editor__field-row">
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min={0}
+                  max={64}
+                  className="chips-image-editor__number"
+                  value={layoutOptions.gap}
+                  onChange={(event) => updateLayout({ gap: Number(event.target.value) || 0 })}
+                />
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+
+            {currentLayoutType === "single" ? (
+              <>
+                <div className="chips-image-editor__inline-fields">
+                  <input
+                    type="range"
+                    min={10}
+                    max={100}
+                    step={5}
+                    value={layoutOptions.single_width_percent}
+                    onChange={(event) => updateLayout({ single_width_percent: Number(event.target.value) || 100 })}
+                  />
+                  <span className="chips-image-editor__badge">
+                    {t("layout.widthPercent", { value: layoutOptions.single_width_percent ?? 100 })}
+                  </span>
+                </div>
+                <div className="chips-image-editor__segmented">
+                  {([
+                    { value: "left", label: t("layout.alignLeft") },
+                    { value: "center", label: t("layout.alignCenter") },
+                    { value: "right", label: t("layout.alignRight") },
+                  ] as const).map((option) => (
+                    <button
+                      key={option.value}
+                      type="button"
+                      className={[
+                        "chips-image-editor__chip",
+                        (layoutOptions.single_alignment ?? "center") === option.value
+                          ? "chips-image-editor__chip--active"
+                          : "",
+                      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ")}
+                      onClick={() => updateLayout({ single_alignment: option.value as SingleAlignment })}
+                    >
+                      {option.label}
+                    </button>
+                  ))}
+                </div>
+              </>
+            ) : null}
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="chips-image-editor__panel">
+            <div className="chips-image-editor__panel-header">
+              <div>
+                <h2 className="chips-image-editor__panel-title">{t("editor.imageList")}</h2>
+                <p className="chips-image-editor__panel-subtitle">{t("editor.imageListHint")}</p>
+              </div>
+              {draft.images.length > 0 ? (
+                <div className="chips-image-editor__list-actions">
+                  <button
+                    type="button"
+                    className="chips-image-editor__button chips-image-editor__danger"
+                    onClick={clearAllImages}
+                  >
+                    {t("editor.clearAll")}
+                  </button>
+                </div>
+              ) : null}
+            </div>
+
+            <input
+              ref={replaceFileInputRef}
+              type="file"
+              accept={Array.from(["image/jpeg", "image/png", "image/gif", "image/webp", "image/svg+xml"]).join(",")}
+              hidden
+              onChange={(event) => {
+                const file = event.target.files?.[0];
+                const targetId = replaceTargetId;
+                event.currentTarget.value = "";
+                setReplaceTargetId(null);
+                if (file && targetId) {
+                  void handleReplaceFile(file, targetId);
+                }
+              }}
+            />
+
+            {draft.images.length === 0 ? (
+              <div className="chips-image-editor__list-empty">{t("editor.emptyList")}</div>
+            ) : (
+              <div className="chips-image-editor__list">
+                {draft.images.map((image, index) => (
+                  <div
+                    key={image.id}
+                    className={[
+                      "chips-image-editor__item",
+                      selectedImageId === image.id ? "chips-image-editor__item--selected" : "",
+                      draggingImageId === image.id ? "chips-image-editor__item--dragging" : "",
+                    ].filter(Boolean).join(" ")}
+                    draggable={draft.images.length > 1}
+                    onClick={() => setSelectedImageId((current) => current === image.id ? null : image.id)}
+                    onDragStart={() => setDraggingImageId(image.id)}
+                    onDragOver={(event) => event.preventDefault()}
+                    onDrop={(event) => {
+                      event.preventDefault();
+                      const currentDragging = draggingImageId;
+                      setDraggingImageId(null);
+                      if (!currentDragging || currentDragging === image.id) {
+                        return;
+                      }
+                      moveImage(currentDragging, index);
+                    }}
+                    onDragEnd={() => setDraggingImageId(null)}
+                  >
+                    <div className="chips-image-editor__thumb">
+                      {getImageDisplaySource(image, resolvedFileUrls) ? (
+                        <img
+                          src={getImageDisplaySource(image, resolvedFileUrls)}
+                          alt={image.alt ?? ""}
+                          draggable={false}
+                        />
+                      ) : (
+                        <div className="chips-image-editor__thumb-placeholder">
+                          {t("image.unavailable")}
+                        </div>
+                      )}
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="chips-image-editor__item-fields">
+                      <div className="chips-image-editor__meta">
+                        <span>#{index + 1}</span>
+                        <span>{image.source === "file" ? t("editor.sourceFile") : t("editor.sourceUrl")}</span>
+                        <span>
+                          {image.source === "file"
+                            ? image.file_path
+                            : image.url}
+                        </span>
+                      </div>
+                      <input
+                        type="text"
+                        className="chips-image-editor__field"
+                        placeholder={t("editor.titlePlaceholder")}
+                        value={image.title ?? ""}
+                        onChange={(event) => updateImage(image.id, { title: event.target.value })}
+                        onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+                      />
+                      <input
+                        type="text"
+                        className="chips-image-editor__field"
+                        placeholder={t("editor.altPlaceholder")}
+                        value={image.alt ?? ""}
+                        onChange={(event) => updateImage(image.id, { alt: event.target.value })}
+                        onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+                      />
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="chips-image-editor__item-actions">
+                      {index > 0 ? (
+                        <button
+                          type="button"
+                          className="chips-image-editor__icon-button"
+                          onClick={(event) => {
+                            event.stopPropagation();
+                            moveImage(image.id, index - 1);
+                          }}
+                          title={t("editor.moveUp")}
+                        >
+                          тЖС
+                        </button>
+                      ) : null}
+                      {index < draft.images.length - 1 ? (
+                        <button
+                          type="button"
+                          className="chips-image-editor__icon-button"
+                          onClick={(event) => {
+                            event.stopPropagation();
+                            moveImage(image.id, index + 1);
+                          }}
+                          title={t("editor.moveDown")}
+                        >
+                          тЖУ
+                        </button>
+                      ) : null}
+                      <button
+                        type="button"
+                        className="chips-image-editor__icon-button"
+                        onClick={(event) => {
+                          event.stopPropagation();
+                          setReplaceTargetId(image.id);
+                          replaceFileInputRef.current?.click();
+                        }}
+                        title={t("editor.replaceImage")}
+                      >
+                        тЖ║
+                      </button>
+                      <button
+                        type="button"
+                        className="chips-image-editor__icon-button chips-image-editor__danger"
+                        onClick={(event) => {
+                          event.stopPropagation();
+                          removeImage(image.id);
+                        }}
+                        title={t("editor.removeImage")}
+                      >
+                        тЬХ
+                      </button>
+                    </div>
+                  </div>
+                ))}
+              </div>
+            )}
+
+            {!validation.valid ? (
+              <ul className="chips-image-editor__error-list">
+                {Object.entries(validation.errors).map(([key, value]) => (
+                  <li key={key}>{value}</li>
+                ))}
+              </ul>
+            ) : null}
+          </section>
+        </div>
+
+        <aside className="chips-image-editor__preview">
+          <h2 className="chips-image-editor__preview-title">{t("editor.previewTitle")}</h2>
+          {selectedImage ? (
+            <div className="chips-image-editor__preview-card">
+              <div className="chips-image-editor__preview-image">
+                {getImageDisplaySource(selectedImage, resolvedFileUrls) ? (
+                  <img
+                    src={getImageDisplaySource(selectedImage, resolvedFileUrls)}
+                    alt={selectedImage.alt ?? ""}
+                  />
+                ) : (
+                  <div className="chips-image-editor__preview-empty">{t("image.unavailable")}</div>
+                )}
+              </div>
+              <div className="chips-image-editor__meta">
+                <span>{selectedImage.title || t("editor.untitled")}</span>
+                <span>{selectedImage.alt || t("editor.noAlt")}</span>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+          ) : (
+            <div className="chips-image-editor__preview-empty">{t("editor.previewHint")}</div>
+          )}
+        </aside>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+
+export function createBasecardEditorRoot(props: BasecardEditorProps): EditorRoot {
+  const root = document.createElement("div") as EditorRoot;
+  root.className = "chips-image-editor-root";
+  root.setAttribute("data-chips-image-editor-root", "true");
+  return root;
+}

name: vercel-react-best-practices
description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. license: MIT
metadata:
  author: vercel
  version: "1.0.0"
---

# Vercel React Best Practices

Comprehensive performance optimization guide for React and Next.js applications, maintained by Vercel. Contains 57 rules across 8 categories, prioritized by impact to guide automated refactoring and code generation.

## When to Apply

Reference these guidelines when:
- Writing new React components or Next.js pages
- Implementing data fetching (client or server-side)
- Reviewing code for performance issues
- Refactoring existing React/Next.js code
- Optimizing bundle size or load times

## Rule Categories by Priority

| Priority | Category | Impact | Prefix |
|----------|----------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Eliminating Waterfalls | CRITICAL | `async-` |
| 2 | Bundle Size Optimization | CRITICAL | `bundle-` |
| 3 | Server-Side Performance | HIGH | `server-` |
| 4 | Client-Side Data Fetching | MEDIUM-HIGH | `client-` |
| 5 | Re-render Optimization | MEDIUM | `rerender-` |
| 6 | Rendering Performance | MEDIUM | `rendering-` |
| 7 | JavaScript Performance | LOW-MEDIUM | `js-` |
| 8 | Advanced Patterns | LOW | `advanced-` |

## Quick Reference

### 1. Eliminating Waterfalls (CRITICAL)

- `async-defer-await` - Move await into branches where actually used
- `async-parallel` - Use Promise.all() for independent operations
- `async-dependencies` - Use better-all for partial dependencies
- `async-api-routes` - Start promises early, await late in API routes
- `async-suspense-boundaries` - Use Suspense to stream content

### 2. Bundle Size Optimization (CRITICAL)

- `bundle-barrel-imports` - Import directly, avoid barrel files
- `bundle-dynamic-imports` - Use next/dynamic for heavy components
- `bundle-defer-third-party` - Load analytics/logging after hydration
- `bundle-conditional` - Load modules only when feature is activated
- `bundle-preload` - Preload on hover/focus for perceived speed

### 3. Server-Side Performance (HIGH)

- `server-auth-actions` - Authenticate server actions like API routes
- `server-cache-react` - Use React.cache() for per-request deduplication
- `server-cache-lru` - Use LRU cache for cross-request caching
- `server-dedup-props` - Avoid duplicate serialization in RSC props
- `server-serialization` - Minimize data passed to client components
- `server-parallel-fetching` - Restructure components to parallelize fetches
- `server-after-nonblocking` - Use after() for non-blocking operations

### 4. Client-Side Data Fetching (MEDIUM-HIGH)

- `client-swr-dedup` - Use SWR for automatic request deduplication
- `client-event-listeners` - Deduplicate global event listeners
- `client-passive-event-listeners` - Use passive listeners for scroll
- `client-localstorage-schema` - Version and minimize localStorage data

### 5. Re-render Optimization (MEDIUM)

- `rerender-defer-reads` - Don't subscribe to state only used in callbacks
- `rerender-memo` - Extract expensive work into memoized components
- `rerender-memo-with-default-value` - Hoist default non-primitive props
- `rerender-dependencies` - Use primitive dependencies in effects
- `rerender-derived-state` - Subscribe to derived booleans, not raw values
- `rerender-derived-state-no-effect` - Derive state during render, not effects
- `rerender-functional-setstate` - Use functional setState for stable callbacks
- `rerender-lazy-state-init` - Pass function to useState for expensive values
- `rerender-simple-expression-in-memo` - Avoid memo for simple primitives
- `rerender-move-effect-to-event` - Put interaction logic in event handlers
- `rerender-transitions` - Use startTransition for non-urgent updates
- `rerender-use-ref-transient-values` - Use refs for transient frequent values

### 6. Rendering Performance (MEDIUM)

- `rendering-animate-svg-wrapper` - Animate div wrapper, not SVG element
- `rendering-content-visibility` - Use content-visibility for long lists
- `rendering-hoist-jsx` - Extract static JSX outside components
- `rendering-svg-precision` - Reduce SVG coordinate precision
- `rendering-hydration-no-flicker` - Use inline script for client-only data
- `rendering-hydration-suppress-warning` - Suppress expected mismatches
- `rendering-activity` - Use Activity component for show/hide
- `rendering-conditional-render` - Use ternary, not && for conditionals
- `rendering-usetransition-loading` - Prefer useTransition for loading state

### 7. JavaScript Performance (LOW-MEDIUM)

- `js-batch-dom-css` - Group CSS changes via classes or cssText
- `js-index-maps` - Build Map for repeated lookups
- `js-cache-property-access` - Cache object properties i
... (truncated)
```

name: vercel-composition-patterns
description:
  React composition patterns that scale. Use when refactoring components with
  boolean prop proliferation, building flexible component libraries, or
  designing reusable APIs. Triggers on tasks involving compound components,
  render props, context providers, or component architecture. Includes React 19
  API changes.
license: MIT
metadata:
  author: vercel
  version: '1.0.0'
---

# React Composition Patterns

Composition patterns for building flexible, maintainable React components. Avoid
boolean prop proliferation by using compound components, lifting state, and
composing internals. These patterns make codebases easier for both humans and AI
agents to work with as they scale.

## When to Apply

Reference these guidelines when:

- Refactoring components with many boolean props
- Building reusable component libraries
- Designing flexible component APIs
- Reviewing component architecture
- Working with compound components or context providers

## Rule Categories by Priority

| Priority | Category                | Impact | Prefix          |
| -------- | ----------------------- | ------ | --------------- |
| 1        | Component Architecture  | HIGH   | `architecture-` |
| 2        | State Management        | MEDIUM | `state-`        |
| 3        | Implementation Patterns | MEDIUM | `patterns-`     |
| 4        | React 19 APIs           | MEDIUM | `react19-`      |

## Quick Reference

### 1. Component Architecture (HIGH)

- `architecture-avoid-boolean-props` - Don't add boolean props to customize
  behavior; use composition
- `architecture-compound-components` - Structure complex components with shared
  context

### 2. State Management (MEDIUM)

- `state-decouple-implementation` - Provider is the only place that knows how
  state is managed
- `state-context-interface` - Define generic interface with state, actions, meta
  for dependency injection
- `state-lift-state` - Move state into provider components for sibling access

### 3. Implementation Patterns (MEDIUM)

- `patterns-explicit-variants` - Create explicit variant components instead of
  boolean modes
- `patterns-children-over-render-props` - Use children for composition instead
  of renderX props

### 4. React 19 APIs (MEDIUM)

> **тЪая╕П React 19+ only.** Skip this section if using React 18 or earlier.

- `react19-no-forwardref` - Don't use `forwardRef`; use `use()` instead of `useContext()`

## How to Use

Read individual rule files for detailed explanations and code examples:

```
rules/architecture-avoid-boolean-props.md
rules/state-context-interface.md
```

Each rule file contains:

- Brief explanation of why it matters
- Incorrect code example with explanation
- Correct code example with explanation
- Additional context and references

## Full Compiled Document

For the complete guide with all rules expanded: `AGENTS.md`
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { BasecardEditorContext } from "../index";
import { createBasecardEditorRoot } from "./panel";

export function mountBasecardEditor(
  ctx: BasecardEditorContext
): () => void {
  const { container, initialConfig, onChange } = ctx;

  while (container.firstChild) {
    container.removeChild(container.firstChild);
  }

  const root = createBasecardEditorRoot({
    initialConfig,
    onChange,
  });

  container.appendChild(root);

  return () => {
    while (container.firstChild) {
      container.removeChild(container.firstChild);
    }
  };
}
```
</details></tool-use>
